title: Os
content:
OS # Linux Syscall Implement # privilege - HardWare Design
CS: code , last two bit, CPL DS: date, last two bit, RPL DPL : destination privilege level
check : if CPL < DPL or CPL = DPL; RPL < DPL or RPL = DPL
Interupt
for Intel x86, INT INTERUPT
#define __LIBRARY__ #include <unistd.h> _syscall3(int,write,int,fd,const char *,buf,off_t,count) Vsyscall & Vdso # also look this
Reference # Linux 核心設計: System call
System Call (系統呼叫)
